description: Charlotte dad bringing bringing my kids to Hilton Head like my parents brought me. Second-generation HHI visitor who loves sharing island traditions with Emma and Jackson.  Some things change, some don't - and that's perfect. Give me tips on what you plan with your kids I've go so many to also share if interested. Something going on all the time.
name: Patterson Regional Sales

description: The Vulture Automotive Story: Grant Durham's Mobile Car Service RevolutionGrant Durham never imagined his frustration with traditional auto repair shops would lead to founding Bluffton's premier mobile automotive service. Growing up on Hilton Head Island, Grant understands the unique challenges of island life – from saltwater corrosion affecting vehicle components to the limited transportation options that make car troubles particularly stressful for residents.After two decades wor
name: AT HOME AUTO CONCIERGE

address: 1 N Forest Beach Drive, Suite M-5
description: Before there was a bright little boutique in Coligny Plaza, there was a boy in Paris who grew up under the cutting tables of his mother’s couture atelier. That boy was Jean-Pierre Klifa. His mother, Rolande Klifa, was a respected Paris dressmaker whose studio was filled with bolts of silk, unfinished gowns on mannequins, and women who came not just for clothes, but for confidence. Jean-Pierre watched fittings, heard every conversation about fabric and fit, and learned very early that a bea
name: Jean-Pierre Klifa
